description_long: This is a metallic helmet reminiscent of ancient Roman or Greek military headgear, featuring a prominent, arched crest running from front to back. The helmet is primarily constructed from a dark, weathered metal with a slightly mottled texture, giving it an aged and battle-worn appearance. The crest is ribbed and extends high above the dome, likely made from metal or stiffened material, and is attached with visible rivets along the sides. The helmet has a solid face guard with a rectangular eye slit and cheek protectors that curve downward, providing additional facial coverage. Subtle bronze or brass accents are visible around the rivets and edges, adding to its historical authenticity. The interior is not visible, but the helmet appears hollow and designed to fit over a human head.
description: A dark, weathered metal helmet with a high, ribbed crest and cheek guards, styled after ancient Roman or Greek military helmets. Bronze accents and rivets add to its historical look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the solid face guard with a rectangular eye slit and the ribbed crest running vertically over the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arched, ribbed crest, cheek protector, and the line of rivets along the helmet's edge.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the full length and ribbed texture of the crest, with the helmet's dome shape visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the crest, cheek protector, and rivet details.
